prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、计算机类等专业在2026年 专业热度分析中均为高热推荐/推荐，社会报考热度持续升温；广西2026年高考总考生约39.2万人，较2025年（约38.0万）增加约1.2万人，物理类考生按比例估算约26.9万人，同 比增加约8500人，竞争加剧。2025年物理类本科批370分、特殊类型495分，与2024年基本持平，未纳入重大调整；上海大学位于上海市，对广西考 生属跨省报考；该校在广西招生占比约2.9%–4.4%（2021–2025年），2025年广西招生13人（含所有科类），属中等规模省外招生，地域偏好无明显偏移。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 6885 → 9462 → 7833 → 17775 → 9919, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and the splitting of major groups, a low ranking of 17775 appeared, but it rebounded to 9919 in 2025, showing a trend of first decreasing and then increasing in recent two years, with a baseline of about 9919 in 2025. The planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 117, 105, 105, 105, and 106 respectively, basically stable at around 105. In 2026 (§ 7), the plan is 110, a slight expansion of about 3.8% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 60th, with a stable position in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper fraud, data falsification, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. It ranks 48th in Douyin popularity, evaluated as relatively hot, with medium-to-high short video exposure, and overall attention is acceptable. Sociology (A) and World History (A-) are the university's A-level disciplines, but they are weakly related to Physics Category enrollment. The main enrollment majors in Physics Category are electronic information, electrical engineering, materials science, and other engineering directions, with no separate discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science are all rated as highly recommended/recommended in the 2026 major popularity analysis, with social application heat continuing to rise. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,000 compared to 2025 (about 380,000). Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 269,000, an increase of about 8,500 year-on-year, intensifying competition. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score is 370, and the special type score is 495, basically unchanged from 2024, with no major adjustments. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application for Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.9%–4.4% (2021–2025), with 13 students enrolled in Guangxi in 2025 (including all categories), which is a medium-scale out-of-province enrollment, with no obvious regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9919, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4 students) which tends to increase the ranking number by about 224, the increase of about 8,500 Physics Category candidates in Guangxi intensifying competition, the negative reputation of the university possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, but the continued attraction of high-scoring candidates by popular majors such as electronic information/electrical engineering, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10174, with a range of 9674–10674.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information
- Electrical Engineering
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None at present.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9674–10674, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors like Materials Science and Economics as main choices, and use Tier 1 majors like Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Science Experimental Class as reach options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9674), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. Physics Category candidates should note subject requirements: Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Materials Science, and Science Experimental Class require first choice Physics + second choice Chemistry; Economics requires first choice Physics + second choice no restriction.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 802 → 957 → 1671 → 2375 → 1417, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing, then increasing, and then decreasing again. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and the splitting of major groups, a low ranking of 2375 appeared. In 2025, it rebounded to 1417, with significant fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1417. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 6, 6, 6, 4, and 3 respectively, showing a decreasing trend year by year. In 2026 (§7), the plan is only 2 students, a 33% reduction compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction, making the ranking number smaller (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 60th, with a stable ranking in the 50–60 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 48th, evaluated as relatively hot, with overall attention at a medium-to-high level. Sociology (A) and World History (A-) are its A-level disciplines, highly related to the History Category enrollment majors (Liberal Arts Experimental Class, including Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc.). The A-level Sociology discipline has a strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In the 2026 major popularity analysis, liberal arts-related majors such as Chinese Language/Literature and Law are recommended/watched with differentiation, and the overall popularity of liberal arts majors is stable. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Guangxi is approximately 392,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 123,000, an increase of about 4,000 compared to 2025 (approximately 119,000), leading to slightly intensified competition. In 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 402 points, and the special type cutoff was 518 points, basically unchanged from 2024, with no major adjustments. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, making it a cross-province application for Guangxi candidates. The university has very few enrollment spots in Guangxi's History Category (only 2 in 2026), which is a small-scale enrollment, and the reduction in enrollment numbers significantly affects rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1417, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-1 person, -33%) making the ranking number smaller by about 283, the increase of about 4,000 History Category candidates in Guangxi intensifying competition, the negative reputation possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, but the A-level Sociology discipline still attracting liberal arts candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1114, with a range of 913–1315.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (including Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, Radio and Television, Advertising, Archaeology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 913–1315, the History Category only has one enrollment major (Liberal Arts Experimental Class, with a plan of 2 students). It is recommended to actively apply if the ranking is within the range. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<913), the admission probability is extremely high. Note the subject requirements: first choice History, no restrictions on the second choice.
